category_sources: Official Gowall docs describe a CLI for converting images and wallpapers to color schemes plus image processing tasks.
source_facts.description says gowall converts a wallpaper color scheme or palette.
display_name_sources: Official docs title and navigation use Gowall.
docs_sources: Official docs include introduction, installation, themes, conversions, effects, config, and scripting pages.
source_facts.homepage is the dedicated official Gowall docs site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Achno/gowall; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official Gowall docs list image recoloring, palette extraction, format conversion, effects, and related features.
